text.title: Judge Calibration Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for calibration-report.json: holdout meta, judge meta, agreement metrics, confusion matrix, decision.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: Fails: holdout size <30, κ below 0.7, missing confusion + false-rates, ship decision contradicts metrics.

list.item: confusion matrix has all label-x-label cells filled.
judge.prompt_hash matches the actual judge prompt file.
false_pass_rate + false_fail_rate explained against business cost.
